none.description: Disable Context7 prefetch for this run.

node-typescript.description: Node.js and TypeScript runtime docs for JavaScript service and tooling work.

libraries.queryHint: runtime APIs, child processes, streams, filesystem behavior, and process lifecycle
types, declarations, module resolution, tsconfig, and compiler behavior

planner-agentic.description: Placeholder bundle for a repo-published planner corpus. Keep this empty until the planner corpus is published to Context7 and the exact libraryId is known.

react-web.description: React and Next.js docs for frontend work.

libraries.queryHint: components, hooks, rendering, forms, and data flow
routing, server components, data fetching, and app router behavior

python-services.description: Python backend docs for API and worker services.

libraries.queryHint: language features, packaging, typing, and standard library behavior
routing, request validation, dependency injection, and OpenAPI behavior

go-services.description: Go service and workflow docs for backend work.

libraries.queryHint: language syntax, testing, concurrency, errors, and module semantics
standard packages, modules, package layout, and reference behavior
workflow setup, activities, schedules, retries, and worker bootstrap

persistence.description: Database and storage docs for persistence work.

libraries.queryHint: schema changes, indexes, transactions, constraints, and query behavior
local persistence, fts, schema migration, and durability patterns

infra-ops.description: Infrastructure and service-manager docs for deployment and operations work.

libraries.queryHint: images, builds, volumes, networking, and runtime configuration
units, dependencies, restart policies, readiness, and service management
